# Opentrons Knowledge

> Immutable, versioned Opentrons Knowledge Corpus artifacts (tar.zst + OCI) for protocol development.

The primary product is the corpus artifact, not a search SDK or lookup library.

## Agent start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): short agent entrypoint
- [docs/agent-usage.md](docs/agent-usage.md): full agent consumption guide

## Product docs

- [README.md](README.md): build, pack, CLI
- [docs/product-architecture.md](docs/product-architecture.md): architecture
- [docs/corpus-format.md](docs/corpus-format.md): artifact layout and schemas
- [docs/source-analysis.md](docs/source-analysis.md): source pins and docs layout
- [docs/versioning.md](docs/versioning.md): version axes
- [docs/release-process.md](docs/release-process.md): release and publish
- [LICENSE](LICENSE) / [NOTICE](NOTICE): Apache License 2.0 (Opentrons Labworks, Inc.)

## Published artifact discovery

- Packed file: `opentrons-knowledge-<version>.tar.zst` (GitHub Releases)
- OCI: `ghcr.io/opentrons/opentrons-knowledge:<version>` (ORAS pull)

After unpack/pull, agents should open:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `docs/agent-usage.md`
- `manifest.yaml`
- `corpus/*.jsonl.zst`
- `indexes/lexical/`
